feat.name: Major Lesson
feat.special: You can select this feat a second time if you’re 14th level or higher, and a third time if you’re 18th level or higher. Choose a different lesson each time.
feat.text: Your patron grants you even greater secrets. Choose a major, greater, or basic lesson from the list here. You gain its associated hex, and your familiar learns the associated spell.

traits.name: Witch
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the witch class.
